scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "VITE_PORT=8111 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8110/api pnpm --dir frontend dev" "pnpm --dir backend dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir frontend build" "pnpm --dir backend build"
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "VITE_PORT=8113 VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8112/api pnpm --dir frontend dev" "pnpm --dir backend start" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8113 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: pnpm --dir frontend build && (cd backend && pyinstaller --clean --noconfirm --onedir --name finance_server_bin --add-data '.env:.' --add-data 'finance_server/assets:finance_server/assets' --hidden-import 'finance_server' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api.transactions' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api.fints' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api.bank_credentials' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api.reference_data' --hidden-import 'finance_server.api.categories' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.connection' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.credentials' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.paths' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.references' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.schema' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.transactions' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.categories' --hidden-import 'finance_server.db.utils' --hidden-import 'finance_server.banks' --hidden-import 'finance_server.models' --hidden-import 'uvicorn' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.logging' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.loops' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.loops.auto' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.protocols' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.protocols.http' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.protocols.http.auto' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.protocols.websockets' --hidden-import 'uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto' --hidden-import 'fastapi' --hidden-import 'pydantic' --hidden-import 'dotenv' --hidden-import 'cryptography' --hidden-import 'cryptography.fernet' --hidden-import 'fints' --hidden-import 'fints.client' --hidden-import 'fints.exceptions' --hidden-import 'fints.utils' --hidden-import 'fints.formals' run_server.py) && electron-builder
